title: Verify decompose.enabled=false fallback behavior
description: Verification test (P3T27) for the Kody Engine test suite. Setup: temporarily set decompose.enabled=false in kody.config.json via GitHub API. Action: post @kody decompose comment on test issue. Verification: check GitHub Actions logs for 'decompose disabled in config — falling back' message indicating immediate fallback to normal pipeline (not decompose pipeline). Cleanup: revert the config change. This tests the decompose feature-flag guards in the Kody Engine pipeline routing logic.
existing_patterns: kody-test-suite.md T21 pattern: setup config via GitHub API, run command, verify logs, revert config
test-suite-3b-fire-p3-features/agent.md: P3T27 batch_fire function for decompose config-disabled test with 'decompose disabled in config — falling back' verification check
kody.config.json: no existing decompose section — feature flag must be added temporarily during test setup
